summary: Hotfix for public Study/Works pagination responsiveness, BlogEditor top save removal, AI provider dropdown restoration, and invalid Next segment config.
changed: Removed server-side session checks from public Study and Works list render paths
Moved Study and Works admin affordances behind PublicAdminClientGate
Removed BlogEditor top sticky save/action bar
Kept bottom Create/Update and keyboard save behavior
Constrained AIFixDialog provider options to openai and codex
Changed backend runtime provider listing so Codex appears when CodexCommand is configured
Passed configured OpenAI API key to Codex child processes
Fixed public list revalidate exports to literal 60

validations.command: npx vitest run src/test/blog-editor.test.tsx src/test/public-admin-rendering.test.tsx src/test/admin-ai-fix-dialog.test.tsx --pool=threads

validations.details: Component target passed, 4 tests passed; existing NU1901 warnings remain
Initial invalid segment config failure fixed by literal revalidate exports

validations.command: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_LOCAL_ADMIN_SHORTCUT=visible npx playwright test tests/public-blog-pagination.spec.ts tests/public-works-pagination.spec.ts tests/e2e-visitor-pagination-journey.spec.ts tests/ui-admin-blog-excerpt.spec.ts tests/admin-blog-ai-dialog.spec.ts --workers=1
npx eslint src tests playwright.config.ts next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs

risks: npm run lint may still fail when Docker-owned .tmp/postgres is unreadable during root scan
AI runtime provider list now represents selectable choices; provider execution still validates auth/configuration at run time
Public list pages are still dynamic in Next route summary due query-driven pagination/search and runtime API fetches
recommendation: Keep as focused hotfix; handle local Docker .tmp ESLint ignore separately.
